title: Component registry
description: Schema for components/dist/registries/{dskit,fmkit,metakit}.json. Locks the registry contract introduced by ζ.0–ζ.3 (uncapped description, wired guidelinesFile, documentationLinks, three-axis section/category/group, populated nestedComponents).

library.description: Identifies which Figma kit this registry was synced from.

fileKey.description: Figma file key — the URL fragment between /design/ and the file name. Used to construct Figma URLs and to fetch the file via REST.

lastSynced.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this registry was generated. Registry-level only; per-component lastSynced was removed in ζ.1 (was diff-noise, no consumers).

componentCount.description: Cached count of entries under components. Convenience field; consumers can also Object.keys(components).length.

components.description: Map of component slug (kebab-case slugified name) to component entry.

templates.description: Meta Kit hand-curated templates block. Preserved across sync runs (sync orchestrator's metakit branch carries this forward).

_meta.description: Meta Kit metadata documenting hybrid-curation surface. Preserved across sync.

key.description: Figma component key (the long hex identifier). Stable across renames; used as the primary identity in the classifier's rename-detection logic and as the lookup key when resolving INSTANCE_SWAP defaults.

nodeId.description: Figma node id of the component (or component set). Used in Figma URLs and as the lookup key when resolving hardcoded INSTANCE children in nestedComponents.

importMethod.description: 'set' for component sets (variants present); 'single' for standalone components. variants field is only emitted when this is 'set'.

description.description: Designer-authored description of the component, from Figma's properties panel. Uncapped in ζ.0; can include markdown line breaks. Consumed by docs site Overview section and plugin brief generator.
examples: A Link visually represents clickable text or elements that navigate users to other pages, sections, or resources.

page.description: Raw Figma page name (with status emoji prefix preserved). Use `group` for the cleaned-name version when present.

section.description: Top-level Figma marker (ζ.2). 'Components' / 'Foundations' / 'Brand Assets' etc. Omitted when documentChildren not supplied (fmkit/metakit syncs).

category.description: Curated value for Components items (Action / Form / ...); page clean-name for Foundations/Brand items (Icons / Marketing icons / ...). Pre-ζ.2 was null for non-COMPONENTS; ζ.2 populates for all entries with documentChildren.

group.description: Third-level grouping. Page clean-name for Components (e.g., 'Tag (Identification key)' for all 9 Tag variants); containing_frame.name for Foundations items; semantic label from components/src/icon-groups.json for icons (ζ.5 — e.g., 'Connector', 'Status', 'Navigation'). Docs sidebar IA + IconGrid both read this.

secondaryGroups.description: Additional semantic groups when an icon belongs to multiple (ζ.5). Today 8 icons (add / book-bookmark / dataset / directory / download / export / minimize / process) span 2 groups. Docs IconGrid renders the icon under primary `group` AND each entry here.

status.description: Derived from page-name status emoji (✍️ / ⚠️ / ⛔️). Omitted entirely for ✅ pages (stable) to match the foundations-status precedent.

properties.description: Non-VARIANT componentPropertyDefinitions keyed by Figma's hash-suffixed identifier. Each value is { type, default }. Used for setProperties on imported instances.

variants.description: VARIANT axes, only present when importMethod === 'set'. Map of axis name to ordered values array.

nestedComponents.description: Component refs nested inside this component (ζ.3). Populated from two signal sources: INSTANCE_SWAP property defaults (curated slots) + hardcoded child INSTANCE nodes (anatomy via tree walk). Empty array when no in-kit refs found.

documentationLinks.description: Pass-through of Figma's COMPONENT_SET documentationLinks field (ζ.1). Designer-authored URLs to external documentation. Empty array when none supplied.

guidelinesFile.description: Path (repo-root-relative) to the curated guideline JSON when one exists for this slug (ζ.1). Resolved from components/src/guidelines/_index.json; null otherwise.

slug.description: Slug of the nested component, resolved within the same registry. Cross-kit refs and external-library refs are dropped (not emitted).

role.description: Property name for instance-swap entries (hash suffix stripped); null for child-instance entries (tree-walked, no semantic role attached).

source.description: How this nesting was discovered. instance-swap = from componentPropertyDefinitions default (curated slot); child-instance = from doc.children tree walk (hardcoded anatomy).

uri.description: External documentation URL (designer-authored in Figma's component description panel).
